ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., lint, tidy, both) */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the command belongs to */,
  "cmd" TEXT /* Executable and arguments to be run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "command_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the command */,
  "command_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the command was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_includes" (
  "include_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each include pattern */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the pattern belongs to */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Gitignore pattern for files to include */,
  "negated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pattern is negated */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., glob, regex) */,
  "pattern_order" INTEGER /* Order of the patterns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("include_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_includes_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_excludes" (
  "exclude_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclude pattern */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the pattern belongs to */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Gitignore pattern for files to exclude */,
  "negated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pattern is negated */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., glob, regex) */,
  "pattern_order" INTEGER /* Order of the patterns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclude_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_excludes_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_env_vars" (
  "env_var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment variable */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the environment variable belongs to */,
  "env_key" TEXT /* Key of the environment variable */,
  "env_value" TEXT /* Value of the environment variable */,
  "env_group" TEXT /* Group of environment variables (e.g., default, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_env_vars_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the version changes */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_versions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the flag belongs to */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., lint, tidy) */,
  "flag_key" TEXT /* Key of the flag */,
  "flag_value" TEXT /* Value of the flag */,
  "flag_group" TEXT /* Group of flags (e.g., default, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_flags_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that was executed */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the command was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the command execution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "execution_duration" REAL /* Duration of the execution */,
  "execution_result" TEXT /* Result of the execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_executions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_executions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, viewer) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the project (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_rights" TEXT /* Access rights of the user for the project (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., daily, weekly, cron) */,
  "schedule_details" TEXT /* Details of the schedule (e.g., cron expression, start date and time) */,
  "schedule_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the schedule */,
  "schedule_enabled" INTEGER /* Enabled status of the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the schedule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_schedules_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that depends on another command */,
  "dependency_command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., pre, post) */,
  "dependency_order" INTEGER /* Order of the dependencies */,
  "dependency_optional" INTEGER /* Optional status of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_dependencies_dependency_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_dependencies_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)
